ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code representing the state (e.g., ACT, NSW) */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the state belongs to (e.g., North, South) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state related to the metrics */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded health metrics */,
  "participant_active" INTEGER /* Number of participants actively engaged in health programs */,
  "worker_active" INTEGER /* Number of healthcare workers active in the state */,
  "participant_recovered" INTEGER /* Number of participants who have recovered */,
  "tests_conducted" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted on that date */,
  "vaccinations_administered" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinations administered on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the health program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_metrics" (
  "program_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the program metric relationship */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related program */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related health metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_metrics_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metrics */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health metric being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workforce" (
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare worker */,
  "worker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the healthcare worker */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the healthcare worker (e.g., doctor, nurse) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the worker is based */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the healthcare worker (e.g., cardiology, pediatrics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workforce_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workforce_specializations" (
  "specialization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialization */,
  "specialization_name" TEXT /* Name of the specialization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specialization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recovery_stats" (
  "recovery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recovery statistic record */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health program related to the recovery */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state related to the recovery */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the recovery statistics were recorded */,
  "total_recoveries" INTEGER /* Total number of recoveries recorded on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recovery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recovery_stats_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recovery_stats_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program outcome record */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health program related to the outcome */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state related to the outcome */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the outcome was recorded */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the program on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_outcomes_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_outcomes_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_users" (
  "program_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the program-user association */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health program */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_users_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health program */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health metric that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., updated, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id")
)
